body: from pathlib import Path  # 路径设置
from selenium import webdriver  # 实例化网络请求模块
# from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By  # 选择器类
# from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys  # 键盘按键类
# from selenium.webdriver.support.wait import WebDriverWait  # 获取浏览器user-agent类
# from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions  # 获取浏览器user-agent条件类
chromedriver_path = str(Path(Path(__file__).parent.absolute(), '${1:chromedriver_exe}'))
chrome_path = str(Path(Path(__file__).parent.absolute(), '${2:chrome_exe}'))
service = webdriver.ChromeService(executable_path=chromedriver_path)  # 实例化浏览器驱动
options = webdriver.ChromeOptions()  # 实例化浏览器options配置对象
options.binary_location = chrome_path  # 设置浏览器路径
# options.add_argument('--headless')  # 设置浏览器无界面模式
# options.add_argument('--ignore-certificate-errors')  # 忽略SSL证书验证
options.add_experimental_option('detach', True)  # 浏览器debug(不关闭)
driver = webdriver.Chrome(service=service, options=options)  # 实例化浏览器对象
.get_cookies()  # python对象格式
# 获取浏览器user-agent
.execute_script('return navigator.userAgent')
# 打印页面内容
.execute_script('window.print()')
